narrative:
Pleasant Twp. township has 2,503 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.9 percentage points.
